summary: Comprehensive testing of SafeWay Bern ORS-based routing app completed. Backend APIs 89% success rate (25/28 tests passed). Frontend fully functional with successful login, map interactions, route calculation, safety scoring, and danger zone visualization. All core features working as designed.

minor_issues.issue: Login fails for test2@safeway.ch but works for test3@safeway.ch
minor_issues.impact: Test user credential inconsistency - not blocking

validation_differences.issue: Returns 422 for invalid coordinates instead of expected 400
validation_differences.impact: HTTP status code variation - functionally correct

validation_differences.issue: Returns 403 for unauthorized access instead of expected 401
validation_differences.impact: HTTP status code variation - functionally correct

ui_bugs.issue: Click blocked by Emergent badge overlay at bottom right
ui_bugs.workaround: Logout functionality works, just playwright click is blocked

passed_tests: User registration with new account
User login with test3@safeway.ch credentials
Dashboard load and navigation
Get 15 schools with correct data structure
Environment status with live weather data
Route alternatives endpoint (ORS) - 3 routes with safety scores
Route safest endpoint - single safest route
Legacy route calculate with school_id
Route saving and management (CRUD operations)
Map click interaction to set start point
School dropdown selection with distance sorting
Route calculation with ORS integration
Safety score visualization (80% score displayed)
Safest route badge display
Risk details expansion with progress bars
Danger zone visualization as red/orange fog circles on map
Route polyline display on Leaflet map
Environment widget showing temperature and AQI
ORS Live badge visibility
Error handling for non-existent schools
